macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Slump as Oil Prices Climb
items.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 764 points or 1.6% as of 11:45 a.m. Eastern time, while the Nasdaq composite declined 0.3%. The market downturn coincides with rising oil prices.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges to $74K as Crypto Market Rallies with Bullish Signals
items.summary: Bitcoin has climbed 9% since late February to $74,000, marking its first time at this level in a month, while altcoins like Solana, Chainlink, and Pepe post sharp gains amid renewed investor confidence. Crypto stocks such as Circle surged 69% and Coinbase nears $200–$220 targets.

items.title: Bitcoin Rebound Signals Potential Start of New Bull Market
items.summary: After dropping 52% from its all-time high to around $60,000, Bitcoin's rebound to $74K suggests the 2026 low may be in, with analysts noting a smaller decline than past cycles and improving economic data pointing to a broader bull market.

items.title: Ethereum Price Rises to $2,123 Amid Market Recovery
items.summary: Ethereum traded at $2,123.32 as of 9:30 a.m. ET on March 5, up $56 from yesterday, while Bitcoin reached $72,722.66, up over $1,000 daily, reflecting ongoing volatility in major cryptocurrencies.

items.title: Trump Slams Banks Over Stablecoin Regulations, Delaying Crypto Bills
items.summary: President Trump's criticism of banks has stalled stablecoin legislation like the GENIUS Act, with disputes over yield payments creating uncertainty and risking crypto firms relocating overseas amid lobbying battles.

items.title: CLARITY Act Hits Roadblock as Banks Reject White House Compromise
items.summary: Negotiations on the landmark US CLARITY Act for crypto market structure have stalled, with banks opposing a White House-backed compromise, further delaying regulatory clarity.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Together AI Unveils FlashAttention 4 and New RL Tools at AI Native Conf
items.summary: Together AI announced major advancements including FlashAttention 4 for up to 4x performance on long sequences, a new Reinforcement Learning API for distributed pipelines, open-source ThunderAgent for 3.6x throughput in agentic workloads, and ATLAS-2 for 1.5x faster inference using real-time data.

items.title: WPI Researchers Achieve 93% Accuracy in AI-Powered Alzheimer's Prediction
items.summary: Worcester Polytechnic Institute scientists used machine learning on MRI scans to detect age- and sex-specific brain patterns, predicting Alzheimer's with 92.87% accuracy and highlighting right hippocampus volume loss in early stages.

items.title: UNC Emphasizes AI Integration in Research for Public Good
items.summary: University of North Carolina's Vice Chancellor outlines AI-driven ecosystems like secure data repositories and computing platforms to accelerate discoveries in health, public health, and beyond, positioning AI as central to transforming research.

items.title: Orange CEO Calls for Telcos to Build Trust as AI Infrastructure at MWC 2026
items.summary: At MWC Barcelona, Orange CEO Christel Heydemann urged telecoms to evolve into 'trust architects' providing cybersecurity and reliable connectivity amid rising agentic AI risks, deepfakes, and data threats.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Pokémon Pokopia Launches on Nintendo Switch 2 with Strong Reviews
items.summary: Pokémon Pokopia, a new live simulation title in the Pokémon franchise, launched today on Nintendo Switch 2 and has received generally positive critical reception with an 89 Metacritic score. It marks an early large-scale attempt at online multiplayer for the life simulation series.

items.title: World Video Game Hall of Fame Announces 12 Finalists for 2026 Induction
items.summary: The Strong Museum of Play revealed 12 finalists including Angry Birds, Mega Man, League of Legends, Skyrim, and others; public voting is open from March 5-13 at worldvideogamehalloffame.org. Final inductees will be announced May 7.
items.source: The Strong Museum of Play / WXXI News

items.title: GeForce NOW Adds 8 New Games This Week Including Slay the Spire 2 and Kingdom Come: Deliverance II
items.summary: NVIDIA's GeForce NOW service announced eight new games for this week, such as Slay the Spire 2 (March 5) and Kingdom Come: Deliverance II (March 3, on Game Pass), plus a March lineup featuring Crimson Desert on March 19.

items.title: Star Citizen Suffers Reported Data Breach Affecting Account Data
items.summary: A data breach impacting some Star Citizen account data was reported, alongside February 2026 gacha revenue rankings led by Genshin Impact and updates for Infinity Nikki.

items.title: GreedFall: The Dying World Plot Revealed in New Trailer
items.summary: NACON and Spiders studio unveiled the plot for GreedFall: The Dying World via a new trailer, highlighting its epic story elements.

items.title: Path of Exile Mirage Major Update Incoming on March 7
items.summary: Path of Exile is set to receive a major free update, Path of Exile Mirage, on March 7, featuring a new challenge league, endgame changes, and build options.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: The Home Depot Launches Industry's First Real-Time Delivery Tracking for Big & Bulky Materials
items.summary: The Home Depot announced the rollout of real-time delivery tracking for big and bulky construction materials by end of Q1, available via mobile app and website, powered by GPS-enabled Driver Handheld app to boost Pro customer productivity and reduce job site delays.

items.title: Tech Giants Sign Trump's Pledge for Self-Supplied Power at Data Centers
items.summary: Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, xAI, Oracle, and OpenAI signed a voluntary 'ratepayer protection pledge' to provide their own power generation for data centers, aiming to shield consumers from higher energy costs amid infrastructure demands.
